validated_commands.ci_test: mix ecto.create --quiet && mix ecto.migrate --quiet && mix test
validated_commands.note: mix not available in CI runner; tests reviewed for correctness and validated by CI on merge

testing_notes.framework: ExUnit with DataCase (async: true for DB tests via Sandbox), Factory via ex_machina
testing_notes.async_pattern: async: true with DataCase is common; async: false only for shared global state
testing_notes.factory: KlassHero.Factory with build/insert_pair/etc; factory files in test/support/factory.ex
testing_notes.event_tests: Participation domain event tests use pure struct construction, no DB needed
testing_notes.coverage_tool: excoveralls (mix coveralls.html); CI does not block on coverage thresholds
testing_notes.mix_unavailable: mix binary not in PATH in CI runner; must verify test correctness by reading implementation
testing_notes.mapper_test_pattern: Use ExUnit.Case async:true with struct!() helper + override map; ChildMapperTest is the canonical reference
testing_notes.struct_helper_pattern: Use struct!(ModuleName, Map.merge(defaults, overrides)) NOT Map.merge on a struct (latter returns plain map, breaking pattern matches in tested code)
testing_notes.use_case_integration_test_pattern: Use DataCase + insert factory or create via use case + Repo.get or get_by_id for DB-level assertions
testing_notes.provider_use_case_pattern: Call through Provider context module (Provider.create_provider_profile/1), not use case directly; fixtures bypass use case via schema insert
testing_notes.program_catalog_test_note: program_catalog use case tests call use case directly (CreateProgram.execute/1) OR through ProgramCatalog context; async: true safe as long as no Application config mutation and no program_listings cleanup
testing_notes.program_catalog_async_false: list_all_programs_integration_test.exs and list_provider_programs_test.exs use async:false because they delete all ProgramListingSchema rows in setup
testing_notes.program_schema_valid_attrs: CreateProgram needs: title (non-empty string), description (non-empty string), category (from shared categories), price (Decimal non-negative), pricing_period (string), provider_id (non-empty UUID string), age_range optional
testing_notes.safeoutputs_mcp_workaround: safeoutputs tools not in tool list; call via HTTP at host.docker.internal:80/mcp/safeoutputs with auth from /home/runner/.copilot/mcp-config.json; use Python script pattern from /tmp/gh-aw/agent/mcp_call.py

testing_backlog.description: E2E scale tests for messaging PubSub fan-out (Issue #515); needs real PubSub infra and maintainer decisions on CI budget/approach

admin provider_live.ex on_item_updated/2 publishes provider_verified/provider_unverified integration events; existing tests verify DB state only; architecturally constrained (TestIntegrationEventPublisher stores in calling process's dict, not LiveView process)

completed_work.description: 26 pure unit tests: StaffMemberMapper (21) covering atomize_invitation_status nil/binary/atom branches, nil-guards for tags/qualifications/user_id, maybe_add_id with/without id, atom->string for to_schema; ProgramStaffAssignmentMapper (5) covering UUID conversions, active vs unassigned state, timestamps.
Commented on issue #636 (TOCTOU testing guidance), commented on PR #634 (arity mismatch + superseded by main tests). No new PR this run.

57 pure unit tests for 4 messaging persistence mappers: MessageMapper (22 - build_sender_names_map NotLoaded/nil filtering), ConversationMapper (13 - NotLoaded association guards), InboundEmailMapper (14 - all status/content_status branches), EmailReplyMapper (8 - all status branches). No DB required.
14 pure unit tests for BehavioralNoteMapper - to_domain/1 (5), to_persistence/1 (5), update_schema/1 (4). Completes participation mapper test trilogy alongside PR #626.
14 DataCase integration tests for CreateProgram (6), GetProgramById (3), UpdateProgram (4), context delegation (2); safeoutputs tools unavailable in CI runner so PR not created via API
completed_work.note: execute/1 vs execute/2 arity bug; CreateProgram/UpdateProgram tests superseded by main

completed_work.description: 23 pure unit tests for ProgramSessionMapper (13) and ParticipationRecordMapper (10) - nil-filtering in to_persistence/1, all-status to_domain/1, update_schema/1 mutable-field subsets
7 DataCase integration tests for CreateProviderProfile use case
17 pure unit tests for ConsentMapper and ParentProfileMapper
11 new async unit tests extending participation_events_payload_test.exs
